# Delta9

> OpenCode plugin for strategic AI coordination with Commander + Council + Operators architecture.

## Quick Start

1. Read `docs/spec.md` (source of truth)
2. See `docs/README.md` for navigation
3. See `docs/plugin-guide/` for building plugins

## Documentation

- [docs/README.md](docs/README.md): Navigation hub
- [docs/spec.md](docs/spec.md): Full specification (876 lines)
- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md): Project overview
- [PLAN.md](PLAN.md): Implementation roadmap

## Plugin Development

- [docs/plugin-guide/](docs/plugin-guide/): 14 modular files covering all patterns
- [docs/opencode/](docs/opencode/): OpenCode platform reference (10 files)
- [docs/patterns/](docs/patterns/): Best practices & examples

## Delta9 Architecture

- [docs/delta9/architecture.md](docs/delta9/architecture.md): System design
- [docs/delta9/agents.md](docs/delta9/agents.md): Commander, Council, Operators
- [docs/delta9/api.md](docs/delta9/api.md): Internal API

## Key Concepts

- **Commander**: Lead planner, never writes code
- **Council**: 1-4 heterogeneous Oracles
- **Operators**: Task executors (Sonnet 4)
- **Validator**: QA gate (Haiku)
- **Mission State**: `.delta9/mission.json`

## Source

- GitHub: https://github.com/[username]/delta9
